title: Synopsys Delivers Higher Productivity and Quality for Advanced-Node 5G/6G SoCs on Samsung Foundry's Low-Power Process
text: Jointly Developed End-to-End RF Design Reference Flow and Design Solutions Kit, Integrated with Ansys Technologies, Speed Design Closure MOUNTAIN VIEW, Calif. , July 11, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Enabling mutual customers to accelerate their development of advanced-node RF designs for 5G/6G applications, Synopsys (Nasdaq: SNPS) today announced it has developed an RF design reference flow and companion design solutions kit (DSK) that enhance productivity and speed design closure on Samsung Foundry's 8nm RF low-power FinFET process.

title: 7 Best Tech Stocks to Buy in July 2022
text: Tech stocks will likely lead the rebound once the fears of recession subside. These seven tech stocks are the best choices to buy in July.

title: Synopsys: Diversified, Profitable, And Undervalued
text: Synopsys provides Electronic Design Automation services to semiconductor designers, with automakers also soliciting its help as they want more control over the chips they use. Its software tools enable clients to design more complex chips, and at a faster pace too, thereby beating the competition.

title: Synopsys: A Growth Story Hard To Ignore
text: Increased demand from China is expected to provide a significant boost to revenue in FY22. The acquisition of WhiteHat Security will help Synopsys expand in the cybersecurity and service space.

title: Ready to Get Rich With Stocks? You Can't Go Wrong With These 3 Investments
